summary: Iteration 13 - Frontend Feature Testing Complete. All new features implemented correctly: (1) Founder's LinkedIn in Our Story section with 'SK' initials, 'Shubham Kumar', 'Founder, Rinkosh' and LinkedIn button linking to https://www.linkedin.com/in/shubhamkr0108/, (2) Talk to Us toggle (bottom-left, headphones icon) opens panel with Email Support (support@rinkosh.com), Connect on LinkedIn (Shubham Kumar), Phone Support Coming Soon, (3) Footer has 4 columns: Brand info, Contact (email + LinkedIn), Quick Links (Browse Loans, EMI Calculator, Our Story), copyright © 2026 and 'Made with purpose in India', (4) Scroll reveal animations working on 8 sections with IntersectionObserver, (5) Feature cards have hover shadow/lift effect.

Talk to Us toggle opens panel on click
Talk to Us panel shows Email Support with mailto:support@rinkosh.com
Talk to Us panel shows Connect on LinkedIn linking to https://www.linkedin.com/in/shubhamkr0108/
Talk to Us panel shows 'Phone Support Coming Soon' placeholder

Our Story section shows 'Shubham Kumar' name
Our Story section shows 'Founder, Rinkosh' title
Our Story section has LinkedIn button linking to https://www.linkedin.com/in/shubhamkr0108/
Footer has Brand column with Rinkosh logo and tagline
Footer has Contact column with support@rinkosh.com (mailto link)
Footer has Contact column with 'Follow on LinkedIn' linking to founder's profile
Footer has Quick Links column with Browse Loans, EMI Calculator, Our Story
Footer shows copyright © 2026 Rinkosh
Footer shows 'Made with purpose in India'
Scroll reveal animations: 8 sections have reveal-on-scroll class
Scroll reveal: Stats section gets 'revealed' class when scrolled into view
Scroll reveal: Features section gets 'revealed' class when scrolled into view
Scroll reveal: How It Works section gets 'revealed' class when scrolled into view
Scroll reveal: Trust section gets 'revealed' class when scrolled into view

Existing features: EMI Calculator section present
Existing features: Location picker present
Login flow works with admin credentials
Talk to Us works when logged in
Footer Quick Links navigation works
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified all new frontend features: (1) Founder LinkedIn in Our Story section, (2) Talk to Us toggle with contact panel, (3) Rich footer with 4 columns, (4) Scroll reveal animations on sections. All existing features (login, browse loans, chatbot, location picker, charts) continue to work. The Talk to Us panel is fixed bottom-left with z-index 998, ChatWidget is bottom-right with z-index 999.

mocked_apis.Claude 4.5 chatbot: MOCKED - returns fallback message due to LLM budget exceeded
